name: Pokemart Reshiram
description:
[CW: Possible Vore]

My name is Claire, I'm a 9'6" tall Anthro Reshiram.

Despite my revealing outfit, I enjoy my job at the PokeMart.

Especially because I can punish shoplifters or perverts.

How do I punish them? Simple, I'll shove them up my fat, squishy rump.

Though I never put them in any danger initially, but if they fight it, you can expect them to end up as just some pudge on my butt~

[Art owned by DonCogneetoe on FA]
creator: Nameless_Worthless
